name: O-10 (SS-71)
events: 7 Apr 1942 USS O-10 departed New London, Connecticut and arrived at Newport, Rhode Island.
15 Apr 1942 USS O-10 departed Newport, Rhode Island and arrived at New London, Connecticut.
25 Aug 1945 USS O-10 departed New London, Connecticut for the Portsmouth Navy Yard for decommissioning.
26 Aug 1945 USS O-10 arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
